{gujaratiMovies.title}

1h 57m •Drama,Family • UA13+ • 10 Jan, 2025

{/* */}

About the movie

Set in London, this emotional drama follows Aashka, a devoted mother who sacrifices her career to raise her children, Meera and Kabir, while her husband, Kunal, becomes consumed by work. Feeling neglected and undervalued, Aashka leaves home and finds purpose in mentoring students in need of a mother`s care. Her absence forces Kunal and the children to realize her irreplaceable role in their lives, leading to a heartfelt reconciliation and a renewed appreciation for her sacrifices.
